_publications._publicationTitle: Neuroanatomical correlates of working memory performance in Neurofibromatosis 1.

_contextSnippet: Digit span forward 0.116 −0.063 0.676 Digit span backwards 0.212 0.071 0.670
resourceName: Wechslers Intelligence Scale for Children-Fourth edition (WISC-IV)
details: Digit span forward and backwards from WISC-IV loaded onto factor 3 (auditory working memory) with factor loadings of 0.676 and 0.670 respectively. Auditory working memory performance was associated with gray matter volumes in middle frontal gyrus
